Echodesk AI Receptionist

iOS app Get started Download
Live on iOS & Android

AI receptionist
that never misses a booking.

Echodesk answers calls, qualifies callers, and books directly into your Google Calendar — so your chair, treatment room, or schedule is always full, even when you can’t pick up.

✔ 24/7 answering
✔ Google Calendar sync
✔ Your own phone number
Download for iOS Get it on Google Play

From $69/month. No contracts. Pause or cancel anytime.

How it works

1

Connect your Google Calendar

Link your existing Google account so Echodesk can see availability and create real appointments.

2

Pick your number & greeting

Choose a local number, write a short greeting, and decide how you want calls to be handled.

3

AI answers and books for you

Calls are answered instantly. The AI receptionist qualifies callers and books into the right calendar without you lifting a finger.

“We went from missing half our after-hours calls to zero.” – Salon owner, Austin

●

24/7 call answering

Never lose a client to voicemail, after-hours, or a busy day.

●

Google Calendar sync

Real bookings on your real calendar, not a separate inbox.

●

Designed for solo & small teams

Salons, barbers, spas, clinics, handymen, and more.

●

Transparent pricing

Minutes included, fair overage. No long-term contracts.

See Echodesk in action

A quick walkthrough of how calls turn into booked appointments.

Replace the YouTube ID in landing/dist/index.html with your own demo.

Simple, usage-based pricing

Choose a plan with minutes included. Pay only for what you use.

Try it first

Free

Perfect to test your call flow and calendar setup.

$0 /month
  • • Limited minutes to test the product
  • • Connect one Google Calendar
  • • One receptionist line
Start free on iOS
Most popular

For busy calendars

Starter

Ideal for solo operators and small studios.

$69 /month

300 included minutes, then fair per‑minute overage.

  • • AI receptionist answers 24/7
  • • Google Calendar integration
  • • Dedicated local phone number
  • • Caller summaries and call history
  • • Email support
Start with Starter Android app

Growing teams

Pro

For multi‑chair salons, clinics, or busy offices.

$149 /month

800 included minutes, priority support.

  • • Everything in Starter
  • • Higher included minutes
  • • Advanced call routing
  • • Priority onboarding help
Talk to sales

Owners who stopped missing calls

Echodesk runs quietly in the background so you can focus on the work in front of you.

“We went from missing half our after‑hours calls to almost zero. The assistant books straight into our calendar and sends us a summary after each call.”

Maria L.

Salon owner · Austin, TX

“Setup took under 10 minutes. Our clients think they’re talking to a real person, and my team doesn’t have to juggle calls while cutting hair.”

James T.

Barbershop · Chicago, IL

“Echodesk feels built for small businesses like ours. Clients can reach us at all hours, but my staff doesn’t have to be on call 24/7.”

Sarah K.

Spa & wellness · NYC
